name: Rosy Caraway Cheese Dip
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Low-fat cream cheese, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or bowl, combine all ingredients except capers.
Process or mix until very well blended.
2. Add the capers and blend in for a few seconds.
3. Chill the mixture.
4. Best if made several days ahead.
5. Serve in a bowl, sprinkled with chives. Pumpernickel, black bread, or other dark breads pair well with this dip.
From 1993 "Shepherd's Garden Seeds Catalog," page 56.
